docket_entries.description: ORDER CASE CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
REMARK: PLANTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECD VIA MAIL SUBMITTED
REQUEST TO APPPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF FOLLETT-SUITOR, GAIL
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM(PLANTIFF)**GRANTED**
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED NOV-28-2022, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT AIRBNB
DECLARATION RE:REQUEST TO APPEAR AT THE HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT AIRBNB
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. CASE SETTLED. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE RECEIVED AFTER DISSMISSAL IN COURT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,191.58 FILED BY FOLLETT-SUITOR, GAIL AS TO DEFENDANT AIRBNB ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-23-2022 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-25-2023 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION TO FEB-28-2023 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF GAIL FOLLETT-SUITOR IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT AIRBNB IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM, REPRESENTED BY DARIEN SHEPHERD (REPRESENTATIVE). DEFENDANT AIRBNB INFORMS THE COURT THAT PARTIES HAVE REACHED SETTLEMENT AND REQUESTING TO DISMISS THE CASE. COURT ORDERS MATTER IS CONTINUED FOR PARTIES TO PROVIDE DOCUMENTATION PROOF THAT PARTIES HAVE REACHED SETTLEMENT AND THAT BOTH PARTIES AGREE TO DISMISS THE CASE. PLAINTIFF MAY FILE A DISMISSAL WITH THE COURT PRIOR TO THE NEXT COURT DATE TO DISMISS THE CASE. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MURLENE J. RANDLE; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF FOLLETT-SUITOR, GAIL
(SC-109) AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR DARIEN SHEPHERD TO APPEAR ON BEHALF OF AIRBNB FILED BY DEFENDANT AIRBNB
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT AIRBNB
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL REQUESTED BY DEFENDANT **GRANTED**
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-23-2022 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO JAN-25-2023 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM(DEFENDANT)**GRANTED**
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF FOLLETT-SUITOR, GAIL AS TO DEFENDANT AIRBNB
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT AIRBNB

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. CASE SETTLED. PLAINTIFF GAIL FOLLETT-SUITOR IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT AIRBNB IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM, REPRESENTED BY DARIEN SHEPHERD (REPRESENTATIVE). DEFENDANT ORALLY STIPULATION FOR CASE TO BE HEARD BY JUDGE PRO TEM. COURT REQUESTS DEFENDANT AIRBNB TO PROVIDE DOCUMENTATION PROOF THAT SHOWING PARTIES HAVE AGREED TO DISMISS THE CASE WITH PREJUDICE TO DEPT 506'S EMAIL ADDRESS. DEFENDANT AIRBNB EMAILED PROOF TO THE COURT AND STATED INFORMATION IS CONFIDENTIAL, INFORMATION IS REVIEWED BY THE COURT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
STIPULATION FOR JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY DEFENDANT AIRBNB
